source_of_dataset: Kaggle: Crop and Fertilizer Dataset for Western Maharashtra. Saved locally as Crop and fertilizer dataset.csv.

dataset_characteristics.dataset_source: Kaggle: Crop and Fertilizer Dataset for Western Maharashtra. Saved locally as Crop and fertilizer dataset.csv.

preprocessing_steps.treating_outliers: IQR clipping for numerical feature columns
preprocessing_steps.handling_categorical_variables: One-hot encoding for categorical input features and LabelEncoder for fertilizer target
preprocessing_steps.feature_engineering: NPK total, NPK ratios, pH category, and crop-soil combination when columns are available
preprocessing_steps.feature_selection: Target removed; link/id-like columns removed; soil, crop, NPK, pH, rainfall, temperature, and location features retained

experimental_results.fit_diagnosis: No strong overfitting/underfitting sign based on train-validation values.
